title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. myocomum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. myocomum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential remedy for various skin issues and injuries. Herbal preparations of Hawkweed can be found in the form of tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used topically to aid in skin care and wound treatment.
